author: Rahil Pirani

manifest.name: Second Brain Sync

name: Second Brain Sync

releases.author: rahilp
releases.description:
# Second Brain Sync — v1.0.3

Focused update improving sync reliability and performance. This version removes the search UI in favor of using your Second Brain through MCP-compatible AI tools, while adding append functionality to update existing notes instead of creating duplicates.

## What's New

### Append Functionality
- **Update existing notes** — Notes now append updates to existing entries instead of creating duplicates
- **Automatic tracking** — Plugin stores a `second-brain-id` in your note's frontmatter to track synced entries
- **First sync creates, subsequent syncs append** — Initial sync creates a new entry, all future syncs append updates with timestamps

### Improved Auto-Sync
- **Configurable delay** — Set how long to wait after you stop typing before syncing (3-30 seconds, default 5s)
- **No more spam** — Auto-sync now waits for you to pause typing instead of syncing after every few words
- **Duplicate prevention** — Fixed issue where notes would sync twice when frontmatter was modified

### Streamlined Experience
- **Removed search UI** — Search/recall functionality removed from plugin (use your Second Brain through Claude, ChatGPT, or other MCP-compatible tools)
- **Cleaner interface** — Removed sidebar panel, search ribbon icon, and search command
- **Focus on sync** — Plugin now focuses entirely on reliable note syncing

### Bug Fixes
- Fixed duplicate saves when frontmatter is modified during sync
- Improved error handling with better JSON response parsing
- Better connection error messages

## Breaking Changes
- Search/recall functionality has been removed from the plugin
- To search your Second Brain, use MCP-compatible AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.)

## Requirements
- Obsidian v1.7.2 or later
- A deployed Second Brain MCP server on Cloudflare Workers with the `/append` endpoint (v1.1.0+)

## Upgrade Notes
If you're upgrading from v1.0.0-1.0.2:
1. The search sidebar and commands are no longer available
2. Existing notes will automatically use append functionality on next sync
3. Configure auto-sync delay in Settings → Second Brain Sync if needed

## Features (Unchanged)
- Sync tagged notes or your entire vault
- Auto-sync on save with configurable delay
- Chunking for long notes (1,600+ characters)
- Status bar showing last sync time
- Test connection button

releases.author: rahilp
releases.description:
## Second Brain Sync — v1.0.0

Sync your Obsidian notes to your self-hosted Second Brain MCP server on Cloudflare Workers. Recall anything from inside Obsidian or across Claude, ChatGPT, and any MCP-compatible AI tool.

### Features

- **Sync tagged notes or your entire vault** — choose between syncing only notes with a specific frontmatter tag or all notes in your vault
- **Auto-sync on save** — tagged or all notes sync automatically whenever you save
- **Chunking for long notes** — notes over 1,600 characters are split into overlapping segments so each section gets a clean embedding and surfaces precisely in search
- **Sidebar search panel** — search your second brain from inside Obsidian without leaving your vault
- **Status bar** — shows last sync time at a glance
- **Test connection** — verify your Worker URL and token are correct before syncing

### Requirements

- Obsidian v1.7.2 or later
- A deployed [Second Brain MCP server](https://github.com/rahilp/second-brain-cloudflare) on Cloudflare Workers

### Installation

Install directly from Obsidian Community Plugins by searching **Second Brain Sync**, or install manually by downloading `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from this release and copying them to `.obsidian/plugins/second-brain-sync/` in your vault.

### Setup

1. Enable the plugin in Settings → Community Plugins
2. Go to Settings → Second Brain Sync
3. Enter your Worker URL and Auth token
4. Click **Test** to verify the connection
5. Set your sync mode and hit **Sync all**
